faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our solutions

items.question: How does the AI integration work?
items.answer: Our AI system seamlessly integrates with your existing workflows, learning and adapting to your specific needs over time.

items.question: What kind of support do you offer?
items.answer: We provide 24/7 technical support, regular training sessions, and dedicated account managers for enterprise clients.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes, we implement bank-grade security measures and are fully compliant with HIPAA and other healthcare regulations.
